focusedExamRunnerReliability.command: npm.cmd exec vitest -- run src/app/api/exams/_lib/authored-blueprint.test.ts src/app/api/exams/_lib/policy.test.ts src/app/api/exams/_lib/reliability-boundaries.test.ts src/app/api/exams/_lib/finalization-worker.test.ts src/app/api/exams/_lib/finalization-worker-concurrency.test.ts src/app/api/exams/_lib/runner-replay-policy.test.ts src/lib/runner/__tests__/client.test.ts src/lib/runner/__tests__/admission.test.ts

proven: A leased independent worker finalizes an expired active session without a browser request.
The official result row is unique and a second worker run performs no duplicate decision.

Worker completion and retry writes require leased status, exact owner, monotonic lease generation and an unexpired fresh clock; result-bearing jobs alone reconcile owner-independently because their official truth is already terminal.

A real PostgreSQL race pauses one worker immediately before official persistence, reclaims its expired lease, persists a winner, and proves the stale worker cannot change the winning result or any later attempt, session or job projection.

A separate durable runner-request generation remains stable across indeterminate dispatch and lease expiry but advances after determinate failure, without ever reusing the monotonic lease fence generation.

Official runner dispatch persists its local boundary before HTTP; a known immutable remote job resumes only through signed GET polling, a new job is posted once, and terminal CAS replay refreshes and returns the persisted winner.

Signed runner evidence must match the immutable submission/correlation/request binding, authored runtime version and image digest, and the exact visible/hidden test id, visibility, category, count and totals manifest before it can affect grading.
Learner deletion winning either runner-admission boundary maps to non-retryable LEARNER_NOT_ACTIVE and cannot create official exam evidence.
The worker policy and replay classifiers are unit-isolated: focused coverage passes unchanged global thresholds without importing the full exam service.
The highest autosave revision before the server deadline is graded.
A 105-second server-observed disconnect is persisted with bounded material-outage evidence.

Administrator re-exam grants are one-use, concurrent-request-idempotent, reasoned, fresh-MFA gated at the route, require durable material evidence, and bind to the current authoritative failed session.
Grant issuance and exam admission acquire the module advisory lock before the source attempt; a staged PostgreSQL waiter regression completes without a deadlock.
Serializable exam admission retries nested SQLSTATE 40001 failures boundedly, re-evaluates authoritative state, and returns the existing active-session domain conflict to the concurrent loser.
Pending-review, passed, mastered, infrastructure-failure and superseded source sessions cannot use the administrator grant override.
Database checks enforce grant/recheck state shape, and triggers reject mutation of grant/recheck source evidence, attempt binding, and terminal state.
Retake admission fails closed unless content version, policy version, duration, structural blueprint and pinned runtime identity parity match and seed/form identifiers are fresh.

A passing 80-percent result schedules a shorter target-only recheck; a failed recheck completes without changing the source attempt's passing status, and finalization replay cannot rewrite its terminal outcome or timestamps.
Recheck admission locks and revalidates the source attempt, blueprint, effective result, versions and target sets inside its serializable transaction.
Learner lifecycle export includes bounded exam finalization, re-exam grant and mastery-recheck records without worker or administrator identities.
Public forms and grant reports expose neither answer oracles nor hidden tests.
remaining: No deployed physical-browser offline/reconnect or clock-tamper run was performed.
The committed assessment corpus remains unreviewed and therefore cannot supply a production calibrated equivalent-form bank.
The full failed-exam remediation-to-cooldown-to-retake browser journey remains open.
No deployed crash-loss report proves durability of the isolated runner service's remote queue/idempotency state; known remote identities are therefore reconciled without automatic reposting.
No deployed multi-worker crash/lease-expiry chaos report or operator dead-letter UI was produced.
